desc: Number of new cases for the day. Negative numbers may indicate figures have been revised downwards.
New male cases for the day.
New female cases for the day.
Total (cumulative) number of cases to this date, whether probable or confirmed.
Total (cumulative) male cases.
Total (cumulative) female cases.
Confirmed cases by test.
Cases considered likely to be COVID-19.
New cases confirmed by tests for the day.
New cases considered likely to be COVID-19 for the day.
Number of people who have passed away to date.
Number of people currently in hospital with COVID-19.
Number of people that have been in hospital with COVID-19 since the start of reporting.
Number of people currently in intensive care.
Number of people currently in intensive care with mechanical ventilators.
The total number of people who have ever been in ICU.
The total number of people who have ever been in ICU with mechanical ventilators.
The total number of people who have recovered from COVID-19.
The current number of people who are considered to still have COVID-19. Definitions for this can vary widely around the world.
The total number of people who have contracted COVID-19 that are of unknown status. They may have recovered, still have the virus, or have passed away due to it.
The new number of people who have passed away for the day.
The new number people people who are currently hospitalized with COVID-19.
The new number people people who have ever been hospitalized with COVID-19.
The number of people who are currently in ICU relative to the previous day.
The number of people who are currently in ICU with mechanical ventilators relative to the previous day.
The number of people who have ever been in ICU relative to the previous day.
The number of people who have ever been in ICU with mechanical ventilators relative to the previous day.
The total number of people who have recovered from COVID-19 in the previous day.
The current number of people who are considered to still have COVID-19 relative to the previous day.
The total number of people who have contracted COVID-19 that are of unknown status relative to the previous day.

Transmission from cruise ships. Included in 'source_overseas'.

Local-transmission from confirmed cases, counted separately

COVID-19 cases which are currently being contact-traced.
For in-country which may or may not be community transmission (New Zealand data)
The total number of tests to date.
The total number of tests to date which have returned negative results.
The total number of tests to date which have returned positive results.
The total number of new tests in the last day.

The total number of males who are in aged care who currently have contracted COVID-19
The total number of females who are in aged care who currently have contracted COVID-19
The percentile value from baseline of people who have show COVID-19 symptoms in Facebook posts.
The percentile value from baseline of people who have show influenza symptoms in Facebook posts.
The percentile value from baseline of people visiting retail (such as shopping centers) and recreation (such as libraries).
The percentile value from baseline of people visiting grocery stores and pharmacies.
The percentile value from baseline of people visiting parks, beaches, national parks etc.
The percentile value from baseline of people using public transport hubs like train, bus or tram.
The percentile value from baseline of people visiting places of work.
The percentile value from baseline of people visiting places of residence.
